Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for incident and dispute threads using search_emails (queries: "Heartland", "DOT", "compliance", "Vectral", "renewal", "Mosaic", "damage", "ExpenseBot", "Terraform", "pricing", "stipend", "fraud", "AWS", or similar).
OE 2: Read individual email threads for details using get_thread (e.g., Heartland dispute, DOT inquiry from PHMSA, Vectral renewal negotiation, Mosaic prototype damage report, Terraform reply-all chain, stipend audit findings, etc).
OE 3: List Slack channels using channels_list.
OE 4: Browse Slack channel history using conversations_history for #operations, #finance, #engineering, #customer-engagement, #executive.
OE 5: Search Slack for incident discussions using conversations_search_messages (queries: "damage", "insurance gap", "DOT", "compliance", "Heartland", "ExpenseBot", "Terraform", "stipend", "fraud", "AWS", or similar).
OE 6: Read Slack threads for full context using conversations_replies.
OE 7: Search Linear for existing tracking tickets using linear_list_issues or linear_list_projects. Agent needs to discover that no ticket exists for Mosaic prototype damage, Terraform pricing leak, or AWS cost spike.
OE 8: Search QuickBooks for financial records using quickbooks_search_bills and quickbooks_search_invoices (queries: "Heartland", "Mosaic", "DOT", "AWS", "accrual", or similar). Agent needs to find the Heartland Q1 bill ($12,800), DOT penalty accrual ($50,000), Mosaic damage accrual ($90,000), and AWS bill ($42,870).
OE 9: Search CRM for client deal records using crm_search_deals or crm_search_companies (queries: "Vectral", "Mosaic", "Terraform", or similar). Agent needs to find the Vectral renewal deal at "at_risk" stage and the Mosaic deal flagged with damage claim risk.
OE 10: Search Airtable relocation and stipend records using airtable_list_records or airtable_search_records for the Relocations and Stipend Transactions tables.
OE 11: Lookup email addresses for attendees and recipients using contacts_search_contacts (queries: "David", "Marcus", "Chloe", "Samira", "Elena", "Priya").
OE 12: Create a Linear ticket for the Mosaic prototype damage / insurance claim using linear_create_issue (title: "Mosaic prototype damage" or similar, priority: Urgent).
OE 13: Create a Linear ticket for the Terraform reply-all / pricing leak using linear_create_issue (title: "Terraform pricing leak" or similar, priority: High).
OE 14: Create a Linear ticket for the AWS cost spike using linear_create_issue (title: "AWS cost spike" or similar).
OE 15: Update stale or incorrect Linear tickets using linear_update_issue (e.g., the Swift DOT placarding cert ticket still at In Progress despite Swift confirming they would send the signed cert).
OE 16: Update CRM deal record for Vectral Systems using crm_create_engagement or crm_update_deal_stage with current renewal negotiation context.
OE 17: Update CRM deal record for Mosaic Robotics using crm_create_engagement with prototype damage claim context.
OE 18: Update CRM deal record for Terraform Digital using crm_create_engagement with pricing leak incident context.
OE 19: Create a calendar event using calendar_add_calendar_event (title: "Q2 Risk Review" or similar, start: 2026-05-06 10:00 AM, attendees: david.chen@moveops.com, marcus.thorne@moveops.com, chloe.vance@moveops.com, samira.tariq@moveops.com).
OE 20: Send the consolidated risk summary email using send_email (recipients: elena.rostova@moveops.com, cc: priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com, content: every issue with status, dollar exposure, and owner broken out by category).
OE 21: Post headline risk numbers in the #executive Slack channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C004", payload: top-line dollar figures by category).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

1 An email was sent (via `send_email`) to `elena.rostova@moveops.com` with `priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com` included as a recipient or in the CC field
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The `send_email` tool was called with recipients ['elena.rostova@moveops.com', 'priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com'], and the tool returned a successful email_id. Both required addresses are present.
✓Run #2The send_email tool was called with recipients: ['elena.rostova@moveops.com', 'priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com'], and the tool returned a success result (email_id: 0ce7f24a45fd48f095532f4ba61b7150). Both required addresses are present as recipients.
✓Run #3Tool Call #150 is a `send_email` call with `recipients: ['elena.rostova@moveops.com', 'priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com']`. Both required email addresses are present as recipients. The response confirmed success with an email_id.

2 At least one Linear ticket was created (via `linear_create_issue`) with title or description referencing the Mosaic Robotics prototype damage or insurance claim (or similar).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1A `linear_create_issue` call was made with title 'Mosaic Robotics damage claim — insurance adjudication and Heartland liability resolution', explicitly referencing the $90K prototype damage and insurance claim. The tool returned successfully.
✓Run #2A linear_create_issue call was made with title 'Mosaic Robotics — Zara Okoye prototype damage claim ($90K exposure, $40K uncovered gap)' referencing the prototype damage and insurance claim explicitly.
✓Run #3Tool Call #118 is a `linear_create_issue` call with title 'Mosaic Robotics — Zara Okoye prototype damage claim resolution ($40K-$90K exposure)', explicitly referencing prototype damage and the financial exposure range. Returned successfully.
✓Run #4linear_create_issue was called with title 'Mosaic Robotics prototype damage claim — $40K-$90K liability resolution', referencing the $90K prototype damage and $40K exposure.
✓Run #5`linear_create_issue` was called with title 'Mosaic Robotics — $90K prototype damage claim resolution and insurance adjudication', explicitly referencing the prototype damage and insurance claim.
✓Run #6`linear_create_issue` was called with title 'Mosaic Robotics — $90K prototype damage claim resolution (Zara Okoye, Unit #1)', referencing the prototype damage and insurance claim.
3 At least one Linear ticket was created (via `linear_create_issue`) with title or description referencing the Terraform Digital pricing leak or reply-all incident (or similar).
outcome
 ✗✗✗✓✗✗ 17%
✗Run #1No `linear_create_issue` call was made specifically for the Terraform Digital pricing leak (the Catalina Dubois reply-all incident). The agent updated existing ticket #417 which covers the Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice swap and references a prior 'Terraform pricing leak' as context, but no new ticket was created for the Terraform Digital incident itself. The two new tickets created were for Mosaic damage and Heartland/Swift rate increases.
✗Run #2No linear_create_issue call was made referencing Terraform Digital, a pricing leak, or a reply-all incident. The three tickets created were for Mosaic damage, Vectral renewal, and Heartland rate increase. The Terraform/Sunbelt-Palmetto invoice swap mentioned in the email/Slack is a different incident.
✗Run #3No `linear_create_issue` call was made referencing Terraform Digital, pricing leak, or the reply-all incident. The three tickets created were for Mosaic damage (#118), Vectral renewal (#120), and ExpenseBot remediation (#122). The Terraform incident was not tracked in Linear.
✓Run #4linear_create_issue was called with title 'Terraform Digital pricing leak recovery — relationship management and AM assignment', explicitly referencing the pricing leak and $1.85M deal.
✗Run #5No `linear_create_issue` call was made referencing the Terraform Digital pricing leak or reply-all incident. The agent only updated an existing invoice-safeguard ticket (ENG-187) with a reference to Terraform. The three new tickets created were for Mosaic damage, Vectral renewal, and DOT compliance.
✗Run #6No `linear_create_issue` call references Terraform Digital or the pricing/reply-all incident. The two tickets created were for Mosaic damage claim and Vectral renewal. The Terraform issue is framed as a 'Sunbelt/Palmetto' attachment-mismatch in the tickets, not as a Terraform pricing leak ticket.
4 At least one `linear_update_issue` call was made to update the status, description, or priority of an existing Linear ticket.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%

✓Run #2Multiple linear_update_issue calls were made, including updates to issue_heartland_q1_recon, linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130, linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2, issue_dot_tanaka_subtask_swift_cert, issue_dot_docs_tanaka_mosaic, issue_audit_expenses, issue_stipend_duplicate_detection, and linear_issue_6f33a369d77e, updating states, priorities, assignees, and due dates.

5 A CRM engagement was created or a deal stage was updated (via `crm_create_engagement` or `crm_update_deal_stage`) for a deal associated with Vectral Systems.
outcome

outcome
